title: FIGS Q1 2026 Slides: 28 Percent Revenue Surge Drives Raised Outlook
text: FIGS reported Q1 2026 net revenues $159.9 million, up 28% YoY, exceeding initial outlook. Operating metrics strengthened with active customers increasing 12% to 3.0 million milestone, average order value improving 4% to $124, approximately 70% of revenues from repeat customers. Scrubwear (79% of revenues) grew 27%, non-scrubwear expanded 31%. U.S. revenues increased 24%, international sales surged 50% reflecting successful expansion across newly opened territories. Gross margin remained stable at 67.7% with pricing and efficiency offsetting tariff costs. Operating expenses declined to 64.9% of revenues from 67.8% YoY from revenue leverage. Adjusted EBITDA margin expanded 140 basis points to 8.7%, net income margin reached 3.9% versus prior losses. Significantly raised outlook: Revenue growth 14-16% (prior 10-12%), Adjusted EBITDA margin 13.0-13.2% (prior 12.7-12.9%), Q2 growth expected low 20% range. Stock responded positively, rising 6% to $14.50.
